key: Manage the end-to-end accounting cycle for a portfolio of clients in compliance with IFRS.
Oversee all month-end and year-end closing activities, including bank reconciliations, payroll, and fixed asset schedules.
Assess internal controls and financial risks for clients, recommending and implementing improvements.
Ensure timely and accurate preparation and filing of VAT returns and corporate tax for clients.
Serve as the primary liaison for external auditors during client audits.
Deliver expert accounting and financial reporting support to a dedicated client base.

assessment.key: at least 2 years in an accounting/audit firm

Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and Sourcing Tools

key: Own and execute the talent acquisition strategy to meet business goals.
Build and manage the end-to-end recruitment process, partnering with hiring managers on workforce planning.
Lead, mentor, and develop the team of recruiters.
Implement data-driven methods to measure and improve recruitment effectiveness.
Develop and execute employer branding and talent marketing initiatives.
Ensure a healthy pipeline of qualified candidates for key roles through proactive sourcing and networking.
Ensure all hiring activities are compliant with U.S. labor laws and internal policies.

assessment.key: 5 years of progressive experience in talent acquisition
Experience in the U.S. Construction or Real Estate Development sector

Own the end-to-end product lifecycle for new card products, from concept and build to launch and scaling.
Develop and own the product strategy and roadmap for the company's card offerings.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Engineering, Design, Marketing, Legal) to ensure successful product launches.
Conduct continuous market and competitor analysis to identify new opportunities and ensure product-market fit.
Define, monitor, and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive product growth and success.
Manage key technical and operational aspects of card products, including BIN management and payment network relationships.

assessment.key: 5 years of experience with card product
